'''√s-m-zh-zh''' ('''kasamzhezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:weatherise|weatherise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-zh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weatherise|weatherise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √s-m-zh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kasamzhezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisamzhezhoko|thisamzhezhoko]] || [[word:jisamzhezhoko|jisamzhezhoko]] || [[word:shisamzhezhoko|shisamzhezhoko]] || [[word:kisamzhezhoko|kisamzhezhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusamzhezhoko|thuthusamzhezhoko]] || [[word:jujusamzhezhoko|jujusamzhezhoko]] || [[word:shushusamzhezhoko|shushusamzhezhoko]] || [[word:kukusamzhezhoko|kukusamzhezhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæsamzhezhoko|thæsamzhezhoko]] || [[word:jæsamzhezhoko|jæsamzhezhoko]] || [[word:shæsamzhezhoko|shæsamzhezhoko]] || [[word:kæsamzhezhoko|kæsamzhezhoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasamzhezhoko|thasamzhezhoko]] || [[word:jasamzhezhoko|jasamzhezhoko]] || [[word:shasamzhezhoko|shasamzhezhoko]] || [[word:kasamzhezhoko|kasamzhezhoko]]
|-

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
